---
title: "Team"
---

## Principal investigators

*Team member profiles to be added here. Each entry can follow this format:*

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="20%"}
<!-- ![Name](assets/photos/name.jpg){.rounded-circle style="width:100%"} -->
:::
::: {.column width="80%"}
**Dr Jane Smith** · National Physical Laboratory

Role in GEMMA: lead on measurement traceability and primary gas standards.
Research interests: atmospheric measurement, metrology, climate science.

[j.smith@npl.co.uk](mailto:j.smith@npl.co.uk) | [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000)
:::
:::

---

## Researchers and postdoctoral fellows

*To be completed.*

## Advisory board

*To be completed.*

## Alumni

*To be completed.*
